title: If the Evas played guitar what kind would it be

[]: If the Evas played guitar, what kind would it be? Post by BrikHaus » Tue Mar 30, 2010 4:44 pm I'm being 100% serious here.

[]: Post by ran1 » Tue Mar 30, 2010 5:05 pm EoE Hyuga would have to play a Jimi-Hendrix themed guitar. Kaji would definitely play an acoustic, without a doubt. But are you talking about specific brand names, or just what type of guitar?

[]: Post by Legendary » Tue Mar 30, 2010 5:05 pm He's talking about EVAS, not Eva characters.

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Mar 30, 2010 5:26 pm
